device.title: Lawn Mower
device.description: Basic configuration: which mower should be controlled?

data.name: Instance name
data.min_battery_pct: Minimum battery level to start mowing (%)

data_description.name: Used as prefix for all entities. Default: WeatherMow.
data_description.mower_entity_id: The lawn_mower entity of your robot. Required.
data_description.battery_sensor_entity_id: Optional. Dedicated battery sensor for accurate time tracking. Without this, the battery_level attribute of the mower entity is used (often delayed).
data_description.min_battery_pct: Mowing is only allowed when battery is at least this level. Default: 100% (full battery required). Lower = more mowing sessions per day possible.

dwd_weather.title: Weather Data
dwd_weather.description: Weather forecasts for mowing decisions. Recommended: OpenWeatherMap or DWD Weather (HACS) — any weather integration with hourly forecasts works.

data_description.dwd_weather_entity_id: Required. Type: weather.*. Used for temperature/humidity fallback, weather condition rain detection (drizzle), and hourly forecasts via get_forecasts service. Recommendation: OpenWeatherMap (worldwide) or DWD Weather (Germany).
data_description.dwd_radiation_entity_id: Optional. Sensor with hourly radiation forecast in 'data' attribute (W/m²). Only available from DWD — the only source for real solar radiation forecasts. If empty, step 5 follows for fallback configuration.
data_description.dwd_precip_entity_id: Optional, DWD only. Sensor with hourly precipitation forecast in 'data' attribute (mm/h). Leave empty for OpenWeatherMap and other weather integrations — forecasts are then read directly from the weather entity.
data_description.dwd_wind_entity_id: Optional. Wind speed in km/h. Leave empty for OpenWeatherMap — wind is read from the weather entity attribute. Without a wind value, wind drying is not calculated.

rain_sensors.title: Local Rain Sensors
rain_sensors.description: All fields optional — drizzle is detected even without local sensors when a weather entity is configured. Local sensors (Ecowitt, Netatmo) significantly improve accuracy.

data_description.rain_sensor_entity_id: Optional but recommended. Current value in mm or mm/h (e.g. Netatmo, Ecowitt rain_rate). Basis for the 12h rain buffer — the most important sensor for local accuracy.
data_description.rain_1h_sensor_entity_id: Optional. Cumulative rain over the last hour in mm. Native sensor value, no separate buffer needed.
data_description.rain_today_sensor_entity_id: Optional. Total rain since midnight in mm (total_increasing). Used for the morning penalty in the wetness score.
data_description.rain_detector_entity_id: Optional. Accepts binary_sensor (on/off) or sensor (value > 0.05). When triggered, immediately signals 'currently raining'. Ideal for Ecowitt binary_sensor.rain_state or fast piezo sensors.

temp_humidity.title: Temperature, Humidity & Brightness
temp_humidity.description: Local sensors are clearly superior here — weather station data can be kilometers away.

data_description.outdoor_temp_entity_id: Optional but recommended. Sensor in °C. Fallback: temperature attribute of the weather entity. Used for dew point calculation and growth model.
data_description.outdoor_humidity_entity_id: Optional but recommended. Sensor in % relative humidity. Fallback: humidity attribute of the weather entity. Critical for morning dew detection.
data_description.brightness_entity_id: Optional. Sensor in lux. Protects hedgehogs in overcast conditions when the sun is above 10° but still too dark.
data_description.min_brightness_lux: Mowing is blocked if brightness is below this value and sun elevation is below 10°. Default: 2000 lux.

radiation_fallback.title: Radiation Source (no DWD sensor configured)
radiation_fallback.description: This step is skipped if a DWD radiation sensor was provided.

data_description.radiation_source: PV power: more accurate, requires a PV system. Sun elevation: always available, less precise with cloud cover.
data_description.pv_power_entity_id: Optional. AC power in W from the PV system (e.g. SolarEdge, Fronius). Normalized to peak power.
data_description.pv_peak_kw: Installed PV peak power in kWp for normalization. Default: 6.4 kW.

mow_times.title: Mow Window & Thresholds
mow_times.description: All values can be changed later under Settings → Integrations → WeatherMow → Configure.

data.threshold_rain_tomorrow_mm: Forecast rain tomorrow for emergency mow (mm)
data.threshold_min_time_for_emergency_h: Min. remaining time for emergency mow (h)
data.min_sun_h_for_dew: Min. sunshine hours for dew clearance (h)
data.max_growth_mm: Max. grass growth until peak urgency (mm)
data.prevent_auto_resume: Detect and stop unauthorized mower starts

data_description.mow_window_end: Latest end time. Default: 20:00. Important: emergency mowing needs X hours buffer before this time.
data_description.target_daily_duration_h: Target mowing time per day. Default: 2.5 h.
data_description.full_cycle_duration_h: Duration of one full mowing cycle. Default: 2.0 h.
data_description.threshold_wetness_score: Mowing is blocked when wetness score reaches or exceeds this value. Default: 30.
data_description.threshold_rain_today_remaining_mm: Mowing is blocked if forecast rain for remaining hours today exceeds this. Default: 5 mm.
data_description.threshold_rain_tomorrow_mm: Emergency mow triggered if more rain expected tomorrow than this value. Default: 8 mm.
data_description.threshold_min_time_for_emergency_h: Emergency mowing only if at least this many hours remain in the mow window. Default: 2.0 h.
data_description.threshold_dew_temp_offset: Dew is considered evaporated when outdoor temp > dew point + this value. Default: 3.0 °C.
data_description.min_sun_h_for_dew: Hours of continuous sunshine (≥ 200 W/m²) required before morning dew is considered evaporated. Default: 1.0 h. At ≥ 500 W/m² dew is cleared immediately regardless of this value.
data_description.last_fertilization_date: Optional. Boosts growth factor by 50% for 21 days after fertilization. Leave empty if no fertilization.
data_description.max_growth_mm: At this grass height (since last mow), maximum growth urgency is triggered (+15 priority points). Default: 20 mm.
data_description.prevent_auto_resume: Default: enabled. Detects when the mower starts outside the allowed window and sets stop_now=True.

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant.
error.already_configured: An instance with this name is already configured.

data.max_growth_mm: Max. grass growth until peak urgency (mm)
